# CVitae Studio

CVitae Studio creates digital products and web development services. Web Express is a launch service for Paraguayan businesses: a responsive commercial page of up to six sections, starting at PYG 550,000. A custom domain is not included and is quoted separately. Initial deployment to Netlify or Vercel is included, subject to provider limits.

Custom projects—such as shops, bookings, administrative panels, integrations, automation, multilingual sites, and AI features—are quoted after requirements are understood.

Public routes:
- /webs-paraguay — Web Express and custom web services
- /portfolio/demo-climatizacion — conceptual demo for the fictional company ClimaNova Paraguay; it is not a real client or business
- /components and /wrappers — digital products
- /blog — CVitae Studio articles

Contact requests for web services are submitted on /webs-paraguay. The private administration panel is not public content.
